name: Vero Life - Dress Up & Decor
author: Poki
description: Vero Life is a dress-up and decoration game where you create your own stylish character and build a dream home for them! Choose from endless hairstyle, clothing, and shoe options to create the perfect look, then decorate your house with furniture, lamps, wallpapers, and more. Customize every detail, pick your favorite colors, and place your character in the home with fun poses. Ready to design the ultimate Vero Life? How to play Vero Life? To manage items/colors, simply click or tap to equip or unequip them. Drag the items to the desired location. Use the rotate button to adjust their position. To remove an item, use the delete button. Who created Vero Life? Vero Life is created by Entrevero Games. They have other amazing games on Poki: Kawaii Dress-Up , Fairy Dress-Up , Dungeons & Dress-Ups , Bearsus , Cozy Room Design , Full Metal Football , and Stick Fighter ! How can I play Vero Life for free? You can play Vero Life for free on Poki. Can I play Vero Life on mobile devices and desktop? Vero Life can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
